common_cheats.name: Turkey Meatball Spaghetti
common_cheats.description: Turkey Meatball Spaghetti (187.5g 2% turkey mince + 40g spaghetti + 125g passata + onion, herbs, chilli)

totals._note: avg = (weekday×5 + weekend×2) / 7 — update these whenever meal items change

supplements.name: Creatine Monohydrate
supplements.reason: Muscle strength, performance, recovery; emerging cognitive and longevity benefits

supplements.name: Vitamin D3 + K2 (MK-7)
supplements.reason: Baseline 43 nmol/l (insufficiency); also supports insulin sensitivity, testosterone, immunity, cardiovascular health

supplements.name: Magnesium Glycinate
supplements.reason: Sleep quality, muscle recovery, insulin sensitivity (HOMA-IR 2.23), stress resilience

supplements.name: Omega-3 (EPA+DHA)
supplements.reason: Targets high LDL/ApoB and low HDL; anti-inflammatory; longevity

supplements.name: Ashwagandha (KSM-66)
supplements.reason: Testosterone support (low-normal at 11 nmol/l, low LH); cortisol reduction during deficit

recommendations.title: Improve VO2 Max
recommendations.detail: 2x runs/week at current pace (7.2 kph, ~160 bpm). Extend one run from 20 to 30 min over 6-8 weeks. No intervals during the deficit. Re-assess after fat loss phase ends.

recommendations.title: Consider switching to dark chocolate (70%+)
recommendations.detail: Dark chocolate 70%+ has significantly less sugar than milk chocolate, and has meaningful evidence behind it: flavanols support cardiovascular health (improved blood flow, lower blood pressure), and there's reasonable data for cognitive benefits too. It's also more satiating per calorie, so 100 kcal goes further. Worth trying as a swap once the current fat loss phase is established.

planned.title: Fibre & Micronutrient Boost
planned.detail: 1 tbsp chia seeds in morning shake + 1 kiwi at ~3–4pm on weekdays. +~100 kcal/day, +~6g fibre/day. Adds vitamin C, calcium, magnesium, and prebiotic soluble fibre.

planned.title: DEXA Scan
planned.detail: Baseline body composition — fat %, lean mass, visceral fat, bone density, BMR. Nearest dedicated clinic: DexaStrong in Leeds (~45 min via M1 from Archer Lane). Ideal timing: once current fat loss phase ends, to get a clean post-cut baseline.
